name: Cherry Cheese Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 can Dark sweet pitted cherries (16 to 17 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Drain cherries and reserve the liquid. In a bowl, combine brownie mix with 1 egg, vegetable oil, and reserved cherry liquid; stir thoroughly.
Reserve 9 cherries for garnish if desired.
Gently stir the remaining cherries into the brownie mixture; set aside.
In another bowl, beat together cream cheese and sugar until well mixed. Add in coconut and almond extract.
Add the remaining egg to the cream cheese mixture and stir until combined.
Pour half of the brownie mixture and half of the cream cheese mixture alternately into a greased 9-inch square baking pan. Swirl the mixtures together slightly.
Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
